steps.title: Use praise and awards
steps.content: The next sentence explains that reviewers praised Tina's Mouth and that the book won an award. Those details describe how the book was received by critics and the public.

steps.title: Choose the evaluation noun
steps.content: Choice A concerns what inspired the book, not how people responded to it. Choice C contradicts the praise and award. Choice D suggests uncertainty, which the positive reviews do not support. The answer is B.
